title: Leptorkis tradescantiifolia
taxonomy: Leptorkis tradescantiifolia is classified in the family Zingiberaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as ginger family. This plant is a type of ginger native to the tropical regions of Asia. The genus Leptorkis is closely related to other genera within the same family, such as Alpinia and Zingiber. Leptorkis tradescantiifolia is further classified into the subfamily Alpinioideae, which includes many species of ginger and related plants. The species is also sometimes placed in the genus Alpinia, but the classification can vary depending on the source.
